title: Polish Kebab Skewers with Blanc Sauce
description: Delicious Polish-style kebabs with a creamy blanc sauce. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: Thread Polish sausage, onions, bell peppers, and boudin blanc onto kebabs.
Brush kebabs with oil and season with salt and pepper.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Meanwhile, combine 1 cup of mayonnaise, 1 tablespoon of Dijon mustard, and 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh dill in a bowl.
Stir in 1 tablespoon of lemon juice and 1 minced garlic clove.
Serve kebabs with blanc sauce for dipping.
Garnish with additional dill, if desired.
